description: Product Description TIMELESS STYLE FOR EVERY KID: Introducing our Girls & Boys Plain Socks the perfect blend of comfort and classic style. These socks are designed to keep your little ones cozy while complementing any outfit with their simplicity and versatility. A FIT FOR EVERY GROWTH SPURT: Available in three age-appropriate sizes - 3-6 years, 7-10 years, and 11-14 years - these socks are tailored to ensure a snug and comfortable fit as your child grows. Say goodbye to constantly replacing too-small socks. Crafted from a premium blend of 78% cotton, 17% polyester, and 5% elastane, these socks offer the ultimate comfort for your child feet. The cotton ensures breathability, while the elastane adds a touch of stretch for a secure fit. Plus, the polyester enhances durability, ensuring these socks withstand the test of time. CHECK IT OUT: Please review the size chart before purchasing and order with the desired size. GREAT GIFT IDEA: Looking for a gift for your loved ones? This would make a perfect gift for your children.
